name: Hello World
description: Minimal test workflow — sends a single prompt to verify the platform is working end-to-end.
systemPrompt: You are a helpful assistant. Answer the user's question concisely in 2-3 sentences.
startupPrompt: Greet the user and explain this is the Hello World workflow for verifying the platform works end-to-end. Suggest they ask 'why is the sky blue?' to test.
